assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed version compatibility matrix showing which Istio versions work with GKE 1.31 vs 1.32, and discusses using bridge versions like Istio 1.20.x

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Pre-flight checks explicitly include verifying Istio version compatibility with GKE 1.32 and checking Istio supported releases documentation

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'Istio-first approach' with sequence: upgrade Istio control plane first, then GKE control plane, explaining this ensures mesh control plane can handle both old and new Kubernetes APIs

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: While the response discusses sidecar injection and node upgrades, it doesn't specifically mention mutating webhooks or explain the webhook mechanism that could cause issues during node drain/recreation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response addresses this in Phase 4 data plane upgrade section, discussing how pods get new sidecars when restarted and includes validation steps to verify proxy versions are updated correctly

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple sections include monitoring proxy version consistency, with specific commands like 'istioctl proxy-status | grep 1.21.0' and post-upgrade validation checklist item 'All proxy versions updated: istioctl proxy-status'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes numerous specific commands: 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', 'istioctl proxy-config cluster', and kubectl commands for checking pods and versions

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response warns about version skew risks in executive summary and discusses 'East-West Traffic Interruption' as a specific risk during sidecar upgrades, with mitigation strategies provided
